violations.description: Demonstration of knowledge by person in charge. — --Person in charge did not demonstrate adequate knowledge of the food service code requirements. Manager on duty unable to answer questions regarding food service.

Duties of person in charge. — --Person in charge did not ensure employee compliance with an aspect of the food service operation specified in the food service code. Manager on duty had no knowledge of food operation.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed food in freezer stored on floor.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface was not disassembled for proper cleaning. Ice cream machine is not cleaned on a schedule and contained spoiled vanilla ice cream.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Observed food build up on all cold hold equipment. Observed black substance in sandwich cold hold.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Observed missing thermometer in cold hold equipment.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed spoiled vanilla ice cream in machine. Dispensing levels observed to have build up of chocolate ice cream.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed food debris on pizza assemble equipment.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed both hot hold equipment contained a build up of food debris on shelves and bottom of equipment.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed walls and floors contained dirt and debris. Need to be clean thoroughly and more frequent.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
